---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to be able to do?**
A clear description of the capability you want.

**Why?**
The problem it solves or the workflow it unlocks.

**Proposed approach (optional)**
Any thoughts on how it might work — a new env option, a tool tweak, etc.

**Additional context**
Anything else that helps.
